REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1520 Thomas Ave., San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Sep-20-2006 Written Order Received
MINI MINUTES: Kevin Ford appearing for and with administrator. Geoffrey Creighton appearing for Olivia Rollard-Epps. The buyer Mr. Brown is in court, he wants to go forward with the sale. Mr. Fords informs the Court that the parties are making progress on settlement that would not involved the house. Mr. Creighton wants to assert the claims on the property. Mr. Ford is not waiving the statute of limitation. Court is not dealing with any claim only the sale today. Terms of sale stated by Mr. Ford. Sale is confirmed at $539,000.00. Additional Bond in the amount of $539,000.00 is required. Counsel to submit an order with bond. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Teena Paxton, CSR #1558. Clerk: Ella Yip.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1520 Thomas Ave., San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Aug-23-2006 Continued To Sep-18-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Geoffrey Creighton appearing for Olivia Pollard-Epps. Kevin Ford appearing for and with administrator Barbara Perkins Cole. Mr. Creighton wants parties to go to mediation before the sale. Mr. Ford wants the sale to go forward today. The buyer Michael Brown and his agent Marsha Thomas are in court. He wants to go forward today. Court questions if Mr. Brown knows what the consequences are if the title of property is being challenged. Mr. Creighton suggests Mr. Brown to get advise from independent counsel and allow parties to mediate. Court agrees it is a good idea. Mr. Brown will take the court's advise. Matter is continued to 9/18. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Teena Paxton CSR#1558. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1520 Thomas Ave., San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Aug-07-2006 Continued To Aug-23-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: APPEARENCES BY GEOFFREY M. CREIGHTON, ATTY FOR OLIVE POLLARD-EPPS; BRENDA GARAN, REPRESENTING SELLER AND BUYER; KEVIN FORD, ATTY. FOR PETITONER; BARBARA P. COLE, PETITIONER.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER ok. THERE IS A QUESTION ON HOW THE TITLE IS HELD ON THE PROPERTY. THE BUYER IS AWARE OF THE ISSUES AND IS WILLING TO BUY THE PROPERTY. THE BUYER IS NOT PRESENT TODAY. MATTER CONTINUED UNTIL 8/23/06. BUYER MUST BE PRESENT OR SUBMIT WRITTEN STATEMENT, STATING THAT HE IS AWARE OF THE TITLE ISSUES AND DOES WISHES TO BUY THE PROPERTY.
COMM:DOROTHY MCMATH;CLERK:LARRISA DOTSON, RPTR: CHRISTINA PAXTON

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1522 Thomas Ave., San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Jun-19-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Kevin Ford appearing for administrator. Geoffrey Creighton appearing for Olivia Pollard-Epps, objector. She is objecting to the sale of 1520 Thomas Street. Eviction proceeding is set for hearing on 7/17. The buyer may have some concerns on going forward with the sale today. Court will continued the hearing on sale of 1520 Thomas Street to 8/7. Court is going forward with the sale of 1522 Thomas Street. Sale is confirmed at $581,000.00. N/B. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
